case_title: SHAKRIS VIBOONVORADEJ VS FEDERAL EXPRESS C/O C T CORPORATION SYSTEM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SHAKRIS VIBOONVORADEJ AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS C/O C T CORPORATION SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO C.T. CORP SYSTEM AGENT FOR FEDERAL EXPRESS RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAKRIS VIBOONVORADEJ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS C/O C T CORPORATION SYSTEM $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $771.00, DEFENDANT TO RETURN PRINTS TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
